headline: Atlassian (TEAM) Earns Buy Reco, PT Upgrade, Climbs 8%
summary: Atlassian Corp. (NASDAQ:TEAM) is one of the 10 Stocks Dominating With Powerful Gains. Atlassian saw its share prices jump by 8.16 percent on Friday to close at $87.46 apiece, as investors gobbled up shares after an analyst reiterated its bullish rating for its stock.
